'''zozhafaka''' is an [[Aelaki]] [[Adjectives|adjective]] meaning "[[Wikt:elamping|elamping]] (auto-generated)".

== Overview ==
{| class="wikitable"
|-
! Root consonants
| z-zh-f
|-
! Word class
| [[Adjective]]
|-
! Gloss
| [[Wikt:elamping|elamping]] (auto-generated)
|-
! Citation form
| zozhafaka
|}

== Agreement paradigm ==
''Positive degree, no evidential.''
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Gender.Number !! 1st !! 2nd !! 3rd !! 4th
|-
| [[child]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhafithi|zozhafithi]] || [[word:zozhafiji|zozhafiji]] || [[word:zozhafishi|zozhafishi]] || [[word:zozhafiki|zozhafiki]]
|-
| [[child]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhafuthuthu|zozhafuthuthu]] || [[word:zozhafujuju|zozhafujuju]] || [[word:zozhafushushu|zozhafushushu]] || [[word:zozhafukuku|zozhafukuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhafuthu|zozhafuthu]] || [[word:zozhafuju|zozhafuju]] || [[word:zozhafushu|zozhafushu]] || [[word:zozhafuku|zozhafuku]]
|-
| [[child]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhafufthuf|zozhafufthuf]] || [[word:zozhafufjuf|zozhafufjuf]] || [[word:zozhafufshuf|zozhafufshuf]] || [[word:zozhafufkuf|zozhafufkuf]]
|-
| [[female]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhafethe|zozhafethe]] || [[word:zozhafeje|zozhafeje]] || [[word:zozhafeshe|zozhafeshe]] || [[word:zozhafeke|zozhafeke]]
|-
| [[female]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhafothotho|zozhafothotho]] || [[word:zozhafojojo|zozhafojojo]] || [[word:zozhafoshosho|zozhafoshosho]] || [[word:zozhafokoko|zozhafokoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhafotho|zozhafotho]] || [[word:zozhafojo|zozhafojo]] || [[word:zozhafosho|zozhafosho]] || [[word:zozhafoko|zozhafoko]]
|-
| [[female]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhafofthof|zozhafofthof]] || [[word:zozhafofjof|zozhafofjof]] || [[word:zozhafofshof|zozhafofshof]] || [[word:zozhafofkof|zozhafofkof]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfthĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfjĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfshĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfkĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfthĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfjĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfshĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfkĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfthĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfjĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfshĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfkĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[inanimate]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfthĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfthĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfjĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfjĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfshĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfshĂŻf]] || [[word:zozhafĂŻfkĂŻf|zozhafĂŻfkĂŻf]]
|-
| [[male]].[[collective]] || [[word:zozhafĂŠthĂŠ|zozhafĂŠthĂŠ]] || [[word:zozhafĂŠjĂŠ|zozhafĂŠjĂŠ]] || [[word:zozhafĂŠshĂŠ|zozhafĂŠshĂŠ]] || [[word:zozhafĂŠkĂŠ|zozhafĂŠkĂŠ]]
|-
| [[male]].[[plural]] || [[word:zozhafathatha|zozhafathatha]] || [[word:zozhafajaja|zozhafajaja]] || [[word:zozhafashasha|zozhafashasha]] || [[word:zozhafakaka|zozhafakaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[singular]] || [[word:zozhafatha|zozhafatha]] || [[word:zozhafaja|zozhafaja]] || [[word:zozhafasha|zozhafasha]] || [[word:zozhafaka|zozhafaka]]
|-
| [[male]].[[zero]] || [[word:zozhafafthaf|zozhafafthaf]] || [[word:zozhafafjaf|zozhafafjaf]] || [[word:zozhafafshaf|zozhafafshaf]] || [[word:zozhafafkaf|zozhafafkaf]]
|}

== Evidential and TAM forms ==
{| class="wikitable sortable"
! Form !! Surface form
|-
| [[positive]].none || [[word:zozhafasha|zozhafasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozhafshĂ«asha|zozhafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozhafroasha|zozhafroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozhafmuasha|zozhafmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozhafyaasha|zozhafyaasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozhafnkshĂ«asha|gozozhafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozhafnkroasha|gozozhafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozhafnkmuasha|gozozhafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[positive]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozhafnkyaasha|gozozhafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].none || [[word:zozhazhafasha|zozhazhafasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozhazhafshĂ«asha|zozhazhafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozhazhafroasha|zozhazhafroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozhazhafmuasha|zozhazhafmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozhazhafyaasha|zozhazhafyaasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozhazhafnkshĂ«asha|gozozhazhafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozhazhafnkroasha|gozozhazhafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozhazhafnkmuasha|gozozhazhafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[comparative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozhazhafnkyaasha|gozozhazhafnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].none || [[word:zezhĂŠfasha|zezhĂŠfasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zezhĂŠfshĂ«asha|zezhĂŠfshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zezhĂŠfroasha|zezhĂŠfroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zezhĂŠfmuasha|zezhĂŠfmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zezhĂŠfyaasha|zezhĂŠfyaasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozezhĂŠfnkshĂ«asha|gozezhĂŠfnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozezhĂŠfnkroasha|gozezhĂŠfnkroasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozezhĂŠfnkmuasha|gozezhĂŠfnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[superlative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozezhĂŠfnkyaasha|gozezhĂŠfnkyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].none || [[word:zozhfafasha|zozhfafasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[visual]] || [[word:zozhfafshĂ«asha|zozhfafshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hearsay]] || [[word:zozhfafroasha|zozhfafroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[inferential]] || [[word:zozhfafmuasha|zozhfafmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[optative]] || [[word:zozhfafyaasha|zozhfafyaasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[visual]] || [[word:gozozhfafnkshĂ«asha|gozozhfafnkshĂ«asha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[hearsay]] || [[word:gozozhfafnkroasha|gozozhfafnkroasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[inferential]] || [[word:gozozhfafnkmuasha|gozozhfafnkmuasha]]
|-
| [[negative]].[[hodiernal]]_[[optative]] || [[word:gozozhfafnkyaasha|gozozhfafnkyaasha]]
|}

''36 forms generated.''

== See also ==
* [[Aelaki Lexicon]]
